name: 威脅型（封建權力壓迫）
description: 上位者用生死威脅逼迫女主執行任務，簡短有力、不容商量。這類對白的功能是快速建立壓迫感和stakes，讓觀眾為女主的處境捏把汗。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: I'll give you 3 days. If he doesn't go to the Imperial Academy, you know the consequences. ... Do not waste your tears in front of me. If you must, go cry in front of the crown prince. I have high hopes for you. Do not dare disappoint me.
